use_cases: Displaying portfolio or project work in a visually appealing card format
Showcasing SaaS product features with images and descriptions
Creating a project gallery or showcase section on a portfolio website
Linking to external projects with a call-to-action button
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist project card component with smooth hover animations including lift effect, image zoom, and shadow transitions. Features an aspect-video image section, title, description, and CTA link with arrow icon. Built with Tailwind CSS theming variables for easy customization in design systems. Suitable for portfolio pages, project showcases, and SaaS product galleries.
